summary: Strengthens the portable control-plane mutator proposal validator with centralized, closed write-set permissions and mandatory shared plan binding across plan, apply, and stale-plan observations; retains the coherent drift-plan-apply-clean-repeat lifecycle, canonical paths, typed input failure, exact write-set closure, protected-scope preservation, zero-write convergence, stale-plan rejection, and failure-atomic rollback; no v3 ledger integration, compatibility reader, or schema change is introduced.
